_comment: File-doubling demo (drill mode -- player army only, no enemy, no auto-win): zoom on the Spearmen block (seed 12345 at ~500,300), select it, press N for DUPLICATIO -- alternate files tuck in behind their neighbours, halving the frontage and doubling the depth (a deeper, narrower column). Hold, then press B for EXPLICATIO -- each file splits and the rear half steps out laterally, doubling the frontage and halving the depth (back toward the wide line). Nobody teleports: the soldier bodies ease into the reshaped slots at jog speed. Driven live through the real SelectionManager by tools/demo/DemoInputRecorder.gd; world coordinates; physics ticks (60/s).
